Thank you.

entry.title: Hiring SAP SuccessFactors Senior Consultant - Onboarding 2.0 and Recruiting (USA)
entry.content:
Monument Consulting is hiring a fulltime SuccessFactors Senior Consultant to join our growing SuccessFactors practice. If you hold active certifications in SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0 and SuccessFactors Recruiting and want to work for a company that is built on a commitment to our people, this may be the position for you!

Find more information on Monument Consulting and our open position(s) on LinkedIn: (9) LinkedIn or on our careers site: Careers | Monument Careers.

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting Posting

entry.title: How can I deploy an UI Integration Card to WorkZone through CLI
entry.content:
I created an UI integration card through Business Application Studio. I want to version my project through GitHub and setup a pipeline to automatically deploy it on an Advanced Work Zone instance once we merge.

I already found some build script examples on this repository provided by SAP.

Is there a way for us to deploy the created artifact through CLI so we can automate this process through GitHub Actions or any other type of CI/CD tool?

Thanks in advance for any support!

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024 - VRP-13823 - Refresh Employee History by Emp...
entry.content: Hi Balaji, it could be that it only shows if changes were made for specific employees. Since you got an error message maybe it didn't trigger. I am still trying to figure out with my own testing under what circumstances the message you received gets displayed. I've got a lot of meetings today and won't be able to provide an input until tomorrow or Thursday.

entry.title: freeze report column

Hi experts,

Can we freeze a column in a report we created?

entry.title: HCM Brasil - eSocial S-1.3 - Entrega final
entry.content:
Olá pessoal,

Estamos orgulhosos em anunciar que concluímos a etapa final das nossas entregas relacionadas ao eSocial S-1.3.

Nesta última fase, nos dedicamos à revisão das transformações XML de todos os eventos padrão eSocial para estar de acordo com a nova versão do layout e a Nota Técnica S-1.3 Nº 01/2024. Além disso, realizamos mudanças importantes na geração e visualização dos principais eventos impactados: S-1010, S-1200, S-2299, S-2399, S-5001, S-5002, e S-5011.

Antes de darmos detalhes sobre a entrega final, gostaríamos de fazer uma rápida retrospectiva dos principais pontos abordados nos dois blog posts anteriores:

Na primeira fase focamos em entregar todas as modificações dos eventos de escopo limitado, fornecendo aos nossos clientes e parceiros mais tempo para se adaptarem aos seus sistemas. Atualizamos também o documento de entregáveis, com o detalhamento das interfaces de BAdI disponíveis para o complemento da solução.

Na segunda fase, realizamos todas as alterações relacionadas ao evento S-1210 - Pagamentos de Rendimentos do Trabalho. Isso inclui a habilidade de retificar as informações enviadas no ano anterior, sem a necessidade de reabrir os períodos anteriores.

Agora, na terceira e última fase, após a revisão das transformações XML e adaptações necessárias, finalizamos a entrega do eSocial S-1.3. Esta etapa crucial garante que nossos clientes e parceiros estejam atualizados e em conformidade com as últimas normas legais e técnicas.

Aproveitamos esta oportunidade também, para comunicar que realizamos um evento detalhando este novo layout. O evento "eSocial S-1.3 - Potencializando a experiência da solução SAP" foi uma manhã repleta de insights e conhecimentos sobre a nova versão. 

Gostaríamos de agradecer a todos nossos clientes e parceiros que se juntaram a nós neste evento. Foi extremamente valioso para todos os presentes. Você encontra a apresentação e gravação deste evento no nosso Work Zone.

Nesta etapa final, entregamos as alterações necessárias através das seguintes SAP Notes:

  • 3501788 - eSocial - New S-1.3 option for layout configuration
  • 3508286 - eSocial S-1.3 - Transformations objects for standard events without changes
  • 3528070 - Framework - Adjustments to support many employee data in PAL Log output
  • 3525532 - eSocial - Employee Summarizing Events Viewer - Adjustments to use output reporting framework
  • 3517450 - eSocial S-1.3 - Payroll events - S-1200, S-2299 and S-2399
  • 3517449 - eSocial S-1.3 - Transformation objects for payroll events - S-1200, S-2299 and S-2399
  • 3517448 - Prerequisite objects for SAP Note 3517449
  • 3515537 - Prerequisite objects for SAP Note 3515535
  • 3515536 - eSocial S-1.3 - Prerequisite transformation object for SAP Note 3515535
  • 3515535 - eSocial S-1.3 - Table events - S-1000/S-1010
  • 3522167 - Prerequisite objects for SAP Note 3522166
  • 3522166 - eSocial S-1.3 -  Update Visualizador de Eventos Totalizadores de empregador for S-5011 event
  • 3532294 - Prerequisite objects for SAP Note 3531706
  • 3531706 - eSocial S-1.3 - Summarizing Events Viewer - New layout information of S-5001 and S-5002

Lembrando que todas as entregas referentes ao eSocial você consegue encontrar na SAP Note 3418378 - eSocial - Overview - 2024.

Agora, com a finalização deste projeto, encorajamos todos a revisar as atualizações, familiarizar-se com elas e garantir a conformidade com os novos requisitos em seus próprios sistemas. Destacamos que o ambiente de produção restrita do eSocial já está configurado para envio de eventos na versão S-1.3. Na entrada 2.20 das perguntas frequentes do eSocial você encontra as datas parametrizadas para que seus testes possam ser realizados.

Por fim, é de extrema importância manter seus sistemas atualizados para que a instalação das SAP Notes ocorra de forma mais suave e rápida. Neste link disponibilizamos um documento com os pré-requisitos de Support Package mínimos.

Se tiver alguma dúvida, sugestão ou comentário sobre este post, sinta-se à vontade para compartilhar na seção de comentários abaixo.

Não se esqueça de dar um "like" neste post se você achou útil e compartilhá-lo com seus colegas. Siga a tag HCM Payroll Brazil na SAP Community para se manter atualizado sobre as últimas notícias.

Obrigado por nos acompanhar nesta jornada.

Um abraço,

Anderson Marques

entry.title: What to use when? - Let’s explore SuccessFactors APIs
entry.content:
Introduction

In this blog we will try to explore the types of APIs in SAP SuccessFactors (Employee Central [EC] module), i.e. SFAPI and OData API (V2). What are the capabilities these APIs have? What to use when and some project-based recommendations.  

Please note, this blog is written based on my experience and learnings during my project engagement. The challenges I saw during project implementations and support I will be highlighting. Feel free to contribute 😊.

Both the APIs has own sets of capabilities.

Different types of APIs

Compound Employee API OData V2

Used to extract employee data out of EC.

 

It replicates employee master data from EC to SAP systems, payroll systems, and benefits systems. 		It's intended to enable access to SAP SuccessFactors data in the system.
Protocol – SOAPProtocol - OData
Operations – Used for query only

Operations –

CRUD (Create, Read, Update and Delete) operations

Endpoint –

https://{api-server}/sfapi/v1

Endpoint –

https://{api-server}/odata/v2
Spoiler
Link to explore SuccessFactors EC APIs - Business Accelerator Hub

Capabilities of using CompoundEmployee API

  • Fetches requested data of an employee in a single call, with a hierarchal structure response in XML.
  • Replicates only data that has been approved in EC.
  • Response compares all time slices of all entities specified in the request.
  • Considering the performance aspect, only those fields which are needed during the replication process are fetched by the APIs.
  • *In standard SAP integrations CompoundEmployee is used – e.g. [Replicate employee master data and organizational data from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA].
  • Different query operations fetch data based on different time slices – back dated, effective dated and future dated records.
  • *In single API response current and changed records can be fetched based on query parameters.

Challenge – API returns all the fields of the portlet; doesn’t support to select specific fields while querying (e.g. “job_information” portlet will return all the fields. Specific fields can’t be queried).

Below is the response snippet of “personal_information”, “employment_information, and  “job_information” portlets – action and changed values.

Spoiler
Link to SAP SuccessFactors HCM Suite SFAPI: Developer Guide

Capabilities of using SuccessFactors OData APIs (V2)

  • Support methods for create, read, update and delete operations.
  • Lightweight output – supports JSON format apart from XML format.
  • Supports back dated, effective dated, and future dated query output.
  • API query supports selective fields to fetch ($select)
  • Supports Navigation ($expand). Recommendation – Avoid Large $expand Statements (using $expand to join a large number of tables can lead to poor performance).

Challenge - If there is a need to fetch the previous value of a field (e.g. Previous cost centre), then this is not possible in the same API call. We have to implement additional logic to fetch that (run a loop and compare relevant field change).

Spoiler
Link to SAP SuccessFactors API Reference Guide (OData V2) - Developer Guide

What is deprecated? 

Spoiler
Please Note - SFAPI is deprecated as of August 1, 2018. Please use OData for new development and consider moving your legacy applications and integrations to OData

Does this mean, CompoundEmployee is deprecated? No, this is the only SFAPI which is not deprecated and there is no plan date for the same as well as this is widely used in SAP standard contents. Means, we can still use this API based on case-to-case basis.

Probable scenarios for using CompoundEmployee

  • While designing global payroll integrations – where bank is expecting current and change records of an employee based on period delta.
  • While replicating employees of org data from SuccessFactors to HCM based on delta changes.
  • Replicating employee and position data between two SuccessFactors.
  • SuccessFactors integration with Ceridian Dayforce.

*Above are some of the project cases where I have considered CompoundEmployee API over OData API (V2).

Conclusion

  • CompoundEmployee can be considered for employee replication scenarios where a single API can fetch most of the data in a hierarchically structured response.
  • OData API (V2) can be considered where limited set of fields are expected from a an API.
  • In case of update records into SuccessFactors, OData API (V2) to be considered as CompoundEmployee API supports only query operations.

entry.title: BOBJ Trigger file not created, how can I run scheduled reports today?
entry.content:
Hi,

Our Business Objects reports (webi) are triggered daily by a flag placed on a JDE file and a text file created. The flag was not set overnight last night and reports were not run. I reset the flag this morning and deleted and re-created the text file on the BO Apps server, but neither set the reports to run.

I am really hoping there is a way to work around itand set the reports to run because there are about 120 daily reports that I hope I do not have to run manually!

The trigger text file is in folder C:\BOBJ_JobStatusIndicators on the BOApps server. The text file name is BOBJ_Ind_SalesComplete.txt.  I have deleted it and re-created it which usually works but it may be too late in the day for it to respond?

BO 4.2sp3.

Suggestions greatly appreciated!

TIA.

Best regards, Emna

entry.title: Re: Creating localized attribute by a custom type
entry.content:
As mansurarisoy pointed out, localized types are really Map types under the hood. So that means your robot will have a different cable in different parts of the world. For example the cable attribute may have values like these:

en_BRcable1
en_UScable2
decable3
frcable3
fr_CAcable2
escable3

where the left column contains ISO codes for the languages (LanguageModel existing in the platform); and the right column contains PKs of the corresponding Cable items. This makes sense, if the cable is some standard cable acceptable in that part of the world. If it's just about the unit of measurement, this design is an overhead and no localization is needed at all, in my opinion.

Now, about the impex. This is impex documentation to use in addition to the links provided mansurarisoy.

I found a few problems with it:

  1. The usage of the Document ID (see Document ID section in the link above), i.e. &cabId. It's not needed because it's not referenced anywhere else. Not really a problem - just a redundant value.
  2. The localized attribute does not specify the locale for the value (see Localizing section in the link above).
  3. Incorrect reference of the cable. The Cable type does not have code attribute (actually no unique attributes at all to identify the cable). So, to reference a cable we need to reference all its attributes. See Item Reference Attributes in the link above.
  4. catalogVersion macro is undefined and the value is not provided. I'm going to remove it, but if it's a required attribute of the Robot, then it has to be provided.

I think, the corrected impex should be like this: 

 

INSERT_UPDATE RegionCable; code[unique=true]
                         ; EU  ;

INSERT_UPDATE Cable; length[unique=true]; lengthUnit(code)[unique=true]
                   ; 2                  ; m

UPDATE Robot; code[unique=true]; cable(length, lengthUnit(code))[lang=en]
            ; ROBOT            ; 2:m

entry.title: Add translation in mass for technical object type in SAP pm
entry.content: Hi All,Is there a way to add the translations in mass..? Please let me know.Thanks.

entry.title: Re: MESSAGE Unable to resolve plug-in "com.sap.adt.ddic.table.ui" ADT Eclipse Connect to S
entry.content: Yes, it's the correct place. It's only a community; for information, the official SAP Support is at https://support.sap.com (for access, ask an S-User to your company).

entry.title: Re: Attachment handling in CPI
entry.content:
Hi Naveen,

In one of my requirement, attachment was being sent from Service Now--> CPI --> Azure DevOps. In my case, I asked to send the attachment in Base64 format and then decoded the same using the decoder available in CPI pallet and uploaded the attachment to a specific URL(part of Azure DevOps).

Hope you get some idea, if you want more details you can elaborate your requirement.

Thanks,

Nidhi

Note:

When i run the command cds watch, i have this line : 

[cds] - using auth strategy { kind: 'mocked', impl: 'node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/auth/basic-auth' }

entry.title: Error in CDS syntax in one system but its fine in another system?
entry.content:
Hello,

The Eclipse (version June 2023 release) is showing an error on the below CDS syntax, unable to save/activate it in our ECC_System_1, but same code is saving/activating fine in S/4_System_2. The error red mark I am seeing at LEFT and RIGHT syntax in CASE statement, if I remove the whole CASE statement then its saving/activating fine

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'YSD_SHP'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'SHP data extract'
define view ZSD_SHP_EXTRACT as select from prps
    inner join proj as proj on proj.pspnr = prps.psphi
{
    key prps.pspnr as pspnr,
        prps.objnr as OBJNR,
    case left( prps.objnr, 2 )
     when 'PR' then right( prps.objnr, 8 )
     else ''
     end as WBS,
     prps.prart as prart,
     prps.psphi as psphi,
     proj.pspid as pspid
}

 

Thanks

entry.title: how to find SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition DB size
entry.content:
Hi, 

Is there a method to find out the DB size of S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition?

entry.title: Re: Winning together: SAP Signavio Process Explorer and SAP Signavio Process Navigator join forces
entry.content:
Hi Naveen_M1510,

yes, both SAP Signavio Process Explorer and Process Navigator are founded on SAP EAM, the process models follow the same entity relationship model.

Best regards

Holger

  • Tracking has been set to Manager (no overrides in any of the individual playback modes)

entry.title: SAP Partner Headlines: The Latest News Delivered Straight to You
entry.content:
In today's fast-paced business world, staying informed about the latest developments is crucial—especially when it comes to navigating SAP’s extensive ecosystem. We understand that keeping up with the constant flow of news and updates from SAP can be a challenge. That's why we're excited to introduce SAP Partner Headlines, a new video series designed to bring you the most important updates in a concise, easy-to-digest format.

Why SAP Partner Headlines?

As SAP continues to evolve, it’s essential for our partners to stay up to speed on the latest programs, events, and strategic changes. However, with so many valuable updates coming from different corners of the organization, it’s easy to feel overwhelmed. SAP Partner Headlines was created to address this need. Each instance will focus on highlighting key developments that impact your business—timely changes, new initiatives, and major announcements that partners should prioritize.

This series is not meant to diminish the value of other news but to make sure you're kept in the loop about the changes that matter most. Our goal is to support you in staying informed and empowered to take full advantage of the opportunities within SAP’s ecosystem.

The First Episode: Key Announcements

In our inaugural episode, we’ll cover two major updates:

  1. The launch of SAP’s new Development Fund for SAP PartnerEdge, which consolidates our market and business development funds into one streamlined approach, aimed at accelerating partner growth and cloud practice development.
  2. SAP TechEd on Tour, where you can continue your learning journey with in-person, deep-dive sessions on SAP’s latest technologies.

Stay Connected

Don’t miss out on the latest SAP partner news—stay informed by subscribing to our newsletter today. We look forward to bringing you the essential updates you need, when you need them, through this exciting new series.

entry.title: Re: Updating the schema of CAPM without losing the data.
entry.content:
Hi @JinoyVarghese ,

Most likely you are looking for Schema Evolution, could you take a look at it, please?

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS - How to Reset the Result?
entry.content:
This issue is resolved with SAP Note.

3293588 - How-to update blank result with BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS?

entry.title: SD self-billing - SAFT
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are working on the SD self-billing process for our project. This is a Portuguese company, and the end customer sends the self-billing document. Our company needs to create the billing document using the SD module to "replicate" the document created by the end customer and handle all subsequent processes.

We want to ensure compliance with Portuguese legal requirements. According to our customer, this SD self-billing document should not have a digital signature and should not be included in the SAFT file.

We have a specific SD document type and a specific number range for this type of document. However, according to SAP Note 2642802, “Since the publication of Despacho 8632/2014, all documents generated in SD (invoices, credit notes, debit notes, pro-formas, deliveries, etc.) must be digitally signed.” This means we cannot create an SD invoice without a digital signature.

We have tried to find information on how to exclude the digital signature in SAP documentation (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9b351d6e33a0496598e4b58782565e8a/9ce5465761a14af4908511c0348360b3.html) or in the SAFT for Portugal user guide PDF from SAP (https://help.sap.com/doc/a3fc11aded07460d99f1f938e1c29496/6.18.latest/en-US/User%20Guide%20for%20SAF-T%20Portugal%20v1.15.pdf), but we could not find this scenario in the documentation. In these two links, we found information about self-billing in the MM (Materials Management) scenario, but not in the SD (Sales and Distribution) scenario like ours.

We have a few questions:

  1. How can we create an SD billing document without a digital signature in this particular scenario?
  2. How should we customize our billing type to indicate that this is a self-billing document?
  3. How can we exclude this document from the SAFT file? According to Chapter 4.2 of the SAFT for Portugal user guide, we did not find this scenario covered.

Thank you for your help.

#SD #SAFT #Portugal #selfbilling #DigitalSignature #SIPT

Ana Machado

entry.title: Highlight Critical materials in IH01
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to highlight Critical materials in yellow in IH01.  I have looked at BADI_EAM_STRUCTURE_LIST but I can't figure out how to make that work or if it is the correct BADI.  It is used in Form OBJECT_TYPE_COLOR in program RIIFLO10, Include MIHIXF40.  All materials are red and we would like the Critical materials to stand out and be highlighted in yellow. 

Thank you for any suggestions.

entry.title: Re: FTE and Proration examples in Compensation
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec, 

This note have helped me on various previous implementations before.  I have a quick question re the H22024 release in preview.  The isActualSalaryImported="false" tag seems to disappear when I try to add it to the XML via Provisioning and save.  Have you seen this before (there are some warning relating to translatable fields). Have the validations change to not be able to save during a warning and must that be cleared for this to be updated?

Thank you

Liezl

entry.title: Re: Cost Center Budgeting control per GL account
entry.content: You should be able to use the GL account group functionality in the budget availability control profile for cost centers. You can assign GL account 123/987 into different G/L account group, and assign different Tolerance limits to each of them. E.g for GL account 123, you will have the activity group Error at 50% of the total, vs. GL account 987 error out at 100%, in your specific example above.

entry.title: ASR integration issue
entry.content:
Dear All, 

 

i am facing an issue when I integrate the ASR scenario SAP TM-EWM. When i go to customizing I am unable to do so for the ASR scenario. 

Can someone please help here. I have added all authorizations to my role . 

Regards

Ekta

entry.title: Re: Buttons are disable in Form Template Maintenance after SDK 2411 upgrade
entry.content: I have noticed the same issue and it is occurring in the test tenant the just received the 2411 upgrade.

entry.title: Re: Retrieve all sales prices for a customer using Sales...
entry.content:
Hi crwtcg002

I tried the API and indeed the product field is required.

One idea would be to try and make a master list of all the items the customer has ordered (maybe from sales orders) and then call recursively, or looks like the POST method is a batch so might be able to call a lot of them in one call.

You probably noticed you get a lot of pricing procedures for even one product/customer combination.

So another option would be to look at the Pricing Condition APIs to see if one of those helps (SAP_COM_294).

Another idea would be to create a Custom CDS View with the fields you want and expose that as an OData API.

Let me know if that helps or you find a solution

thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - Connect to Microsoft 365 Mail with OAuth2
entry.content:
@franz_forsthofer Thanks for this great article! I have a question regarding shared mailboxes. If one technical user has access to several shared mailboxes, do we really need to add separate security material for each shared mailbox we want to connect? Since the user will always be the same and the token needs to be refreshed every 90 days, this can result in a lot of unnecessary work and potential errors. Is there a way that the mail adapter get's an update to use shared mailbox?

I created an influence request. May SAP will add this feature https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/334546

entry.title: Second Half 2024 Release: What’s New in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central?
entry.content:
The Second Half 2024 Release delivers many exciting innovations and enhancements within SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central. We are introducing new capabilities designed to enhance experiences and boost productivity for all users. Here is a quick snapshot of what you can expect to see in this release:

Refreshed People Profile
Building upon the People Profile innovations in our First Half 2024 Release, we are excited to unveil a refreshed look and feel for the full profile view. This modern design, available on desktop and mobile devices, features an intuitive card-style format that makes finding information quick and easy. And with new detailed views, users can navigate to comprehensive summaries of key profile sections, such as compensation information.

Refreshed People Profile (Full View)

AI-Assisted Writing
Additionally, employees can now use our AI-assisted writing functionality to quickly enhance their self-description in the Profile Preview, allowing them to further build their personal brand. Managers and admins can also use AI to create more meaningful workflow comments, helping speed up the approval process.

AI-Assisted Writing for Self-Description

Position Budgeting Control Workbench
We are also excited to introduce a Position Budgeting Control workbench that provides public services organizations with a streamlined view into employee-financing related activities. This new intuitive experience enables simplified error handling and helps ensure commitment runs are executed efficiently and accurately.

Position Budgeting Control Workbench

These are just a few of the many innovations in the SAP SuccessFactors Second Half 2024 Release. To learn more, check out the resources below:

  • Visit the SAP SuccessFactors Community for release documentation, product videos, and solution area blogs
  • Watch the 2H 2024 Release Highlights Video, featuring Bianka Woelke, GVP Head of Application Product Management

entry.title: Re: First name and Last name doesnt show up in Build work zone std edition
entry.content: Sorry, put this in the wrong spot.

entry.title: Publish & Protect: with SAP Advanced Event Mesh & Enterprise Blockchain & SAP BTP Kyma 🚀
entry.content:
Publish & Protect Architecture is the fusion of two technologies, SAP (Advanced) Event Mesh for publishing Event Data, and Enterprise Blockchain for protecting the originality and integrity of Event Data.

The Enterprise Blockchain is actually enabling a number of things to happen, including:

. Being a secure store of the Events which have been published, for future reference, for example in the case of Audit/Internal Control/Governance/Regulation/Compliance. Thanks to storing a copy of every Event at the same time as publishing it, you have the highest level of cyber security on your Data

. Being a secure log in case there is a need to replay and resend Event Data. In the case of a situation where certain Events during a certain time period need to be resent, you can't go in to the S/4HANA and say give me the Contact Name of the Business Partner from last Wednesday because it has already been over written. Thanks to the Enterprise Blockchain, and that every time you publish an Event to the SAP (Advanced) Event Mesh you also write that Event to the Enterprise Blockchain, you have the highest level of cyber security protection on your historical Event Data

This blog is the result of collaboration between myself and Tom Fairbairn from Solace. Tom has published a sister blog to this one on the Solace website, and following SAP Community Rules I cannot link to it, that's fine though because you can easy find the blog on google if you search for Solace Publish and Protect.

We are all either already, or becoming, familiar with Event Driven Architecture (EDA) and SAP's Event Mesh and Advanced Event Mesh.

Almost every day more Standard Events are being built in to SAP S/4HANA. The catalogue gets bigger and bigger https://api.sap.com/products/SAPS4HANA/events/events .

Events like Business Partner https://api.sap.com/event/OP_BUSINESSPARTNEREVENTS/overview , "Informs a remote system about created and changed business partners in an SAP S/4HANA System".

Sending out the Business Partner Event to a remote system informing them about a changed or created business partner, this is the Publish side of Event Driven Architecture.

But what about the Protect side of Event Driven Architecture ?

The Protect side of EDA is about being able to trust the originality and the integrity of the Data.

EDA is about fluidity, it is a fast business, a Business Partner Contact Telephone Number could be changed another system, that system notifies S/4HANA, S/4HANA gets updated with the new Contact Telephone Number for this Business Partner and then informs, Publishes this Data to Subscribing Systems as part of an end to end integrated Business Process.

And here's the thing, what happens if there's a problem at the remote system which is receiving the Events from the S/4HANA, what if we get in to a situation where we need to re-play the Events that came from the S/4HANA ?

What happens if we need to be able to prove the originality and the integrity of Event Data which was sent at a certain time and date, or in-fact at any time ?

SAP Advanced Event Mesh has a feature to store Logs of Events and to be able to replay Event Logs, this has been explained nicely here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/reversing-the-time-with-advanced-event-mesh-unleash-the-power-of-message/ba-p/13548246

As Tom Fairbairn from Solace said in his blog, "A common implementation of the event source pattern is to have a distributed immutable log storing all state transitions, and to rebuild current application state by replaying the state transitions.

Surely this is the solution to publish and protect?

Well, no. This approach doesn’t solve the trust issue: would you replicate your log-based event streaming solution to an untrusted third party? Thought not. Log based streaming solutions also assume that replicas are generally on-line and up to date, which is not a good assumption in cross-organisational scenarios. Lastly, the log is only immutable in log-based streaming because there is no facility within the platform to edit the logs. Anyone with a binary editor can change the data and there is no detection of this or validation of data integrity. For that, you need an enterprise blockchain."

tl;dr;

In Business Processes driven by loosely coupled Event Driven Architecture, when something stops working, how can you reproduce what just happened ?

Replay the logs, where do you store the logs ? Blockchain

If for any one of many reasons and use cases, which we can discuss in the comments, and which we can even write subsequent blogs for, including the how-to guides for implementing the solutions, if you need to be as sure as you can be that the Event Data which you are sending from S/4HANA, that you are keeping "proofs" and evidence and copies of every Event which has been sent, for safe keeping, just in case, in the future you will need to be able to prove the originality and integrity of that Data, then next to your SAP Advanced Event Mesh, you need to deploy an Enterprise Blockchain, which you can do today on the SAP BTP Kyma Runtime, and use that Blockchain as the Immutable store of proof of the Events which have been sent out.

Publish & Protect Architecture

The formidable combination of SAP Advanced Event Mesh and Enterprise Blockchain (on the SAP BTP Kyma)

The combination of enterprise blockchain and event-driven integration gives you the benefits of an immutable, distributed ledger while providing the mechanism to integrate with existing and future enterprise systems.

It gets better, you can run the Blockchain across you and your Partners so that each Partner has a copy of the Blockchain.

In Business Processes driven by loosely coupled Event Driven Architecture, when something stops working, how can you reproduce what just happened ?

Replay the logs, where do you store the logs ? Blockchain

How would it look in practice, what is the Reference Architecture ?

 

 

Of course, you can bring whichever if your favourite Enterprise Blockchain Platform.

The ideal solution is one which runs on the SAP BTP because of:

 

 

Another really simple Publish and Protect Architecture, the easy boiling an egg equivalent of implementing these technologies is to use the SAP Advanced Event Mesh and the Enterprise Blockchain in combination as part of your Business Continuity Planning solution, and write SAP Data to an Enterprise Blockchain which is both Multi Region and Multi Cloud on the SAP BTP like this:

 

 

 

Enterprise AI and the Enterprise Blockchain and Event Driven Architecture with SAP Advanced Event Mesh

And now we're just getting started because the next big one is Enterprise AI, as we all know, in AI, garbage in, garbage out, so how can we be sure that both the Data and Models are protected, that we can trust both the originality and the integrity of the Data and the Models which are the backbone of our Enterprise AI ?

Again, the Enterprise Blockchain. The Events are fed into the Enterprise AI and at the same time written to the Blockchain, alternatively the Enterprise AI reads the Data from the Blockchain, the Data having been fed in to the Blockchain by the SAP Advanced Event Mesh:

 

 

The next case are B2B Business Processes where you are sharing (Publishing) Data to your Business Partners and you need to have the highest cyber security protection of the Data which you are sharing, again this is where the powerful combination of SAP Advanced Event Mesh and the Enterprise Blockchain come together

 

 

To wrap up, a simple reminder, 

The Digital Transformation of Information Security is Enterprise Blockchain

Enterprise Blockchain is the Next Generation Data Integrity, Originality, Confidentiality Protection

Enterprise Blockchain, Enterprise Distributed Ledger Technology is re-imagining information security

If you want the easiest, simplest, most resilient foundation to an Enterprise Business Continuity Planning Solution, just send your S/4HANA Operational Critical Master and Transaction Data to The Enterprise Blockchain. voila.

 
And ultimately, this is all Why I love SAP and Blockchain Databases and why you should too 

These solutions all depend upon positioning Blockchain as an Enterprise Technology Standard, considering the special Business Capabilities of the Blockchain, which then allows the Use Cases to find the Blockchain.

This is what Enterprise Blockchain running on the SAP BTP looks like: https://atkrypto-blockchain-for-sap.ad8ba34.kyma.ondemand.com/

What do you think, are the words Blockchain, Web3, Distributed Ledger Technology, starting to appear in your Company's visions and technology visions ? What use cases are you looking at ? How are you positioning it ? Let's chat about it in the comments.

Andy Silvey.

Independent SAP Technical Architect and CEO of atkrypto

Author Bio:

Andy Silvey is a 25 years SAP Technology veteran [15 years SAP Basis and 10 years SAP Tech Arch including Tech, Integration, Security, Data from 3.1H to S/4HANA PCE on RISE and the BTP and everything in between, and former SCN Moderator and Mentor alumni].

Andy is also co-Founder of atkrypto inc, an startup whose ambition is to make Blockchain easy for Enterprise.

atkrypto's flagship product is the atkrypto Enterprise Blockchain Platform for SAP,  and atkrypto is a SAP Partner Edge Open EcoSystem Partner. 

The atkrypto Enterprise Blockchain Platform for SAP has been designed by SAP Independent Experts for the needs of SAP Customers and to be deployed on the SAP BTP Kyma Runtime Service and leverage native integration to SAP Products.

atkrypto Enterprise Blockchain Platform for SAP has a number of unique qualities, including being the only Blockchain software in the world which has a DataCenter version and a light mobile version which can run on Edge/IoT/Mobile devices and enables data to be written to the Blockchain at the Edge where that same Blockchain is running on a Server in the DataCenter, protecting the integrity and originality of data from the Edge to Insights. Taking Blockchain to the Data at the Edge instead of taking the Data to the Blockchain.

entry.title: BAPI one time vendor
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the requirement to test a BAPI to post na accounting document but using a one time vendor. Which BAPI and fields in the BAPI I should use?

thanks in advance.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Query Regarding User Data Source for Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi Cheryl,

If your existing user data is coming from Azure, I assume that this means that your Enable Now users are authenticated using SAML (Single Sign On).  If that is the case, I'm sure that your technical team can configure SSO to utilize a different IDP system, other than Azure.  The key will be to ensure that the change in SSO configuration does not result in different credentials being sent to Enable Now, it's important to ensure that you utilize the same User ID for the user.  This will determine if Enable Now continues to use the existing user records or creates new ones.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: RFC_DETERMINE_JURISDICTION
entry.content: Can you elaborate on this? What was your solution. I am having the same problem.

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content:
Thank you @Volker_Ruof for always sharing amazing Time Management updates. Can I pick your brain on a few items.
1. Can business rules be used on the Temporary Time Information Object? I tried to create a business rule that raises a message when an employee saves their changes to holiday Calendar, the rule trace shows successful but no message popped up during testing.

2. I did not see work schedule in your list of Job information fields that can be queried while using decision by business rule or calculation by business rule. Is there a way to get the average daily working hours from the work schedule into the business rule? 

3. We have different premium calculations for different employee groups, I was hoping to use the "decision by business rule" valuation type to assign time type group above and below to different employee groups based on the workers comp field in job information. We were able to do this when both rules were in Beta phase but currently it is no longer possible is what you saying. How then do we assign valuations based decision from a job information field that is not in the list. Does it mean we have to keep creating multiple time recording profile for each employee group?

entry.title: Re: SMB Adapter for on-premise file share
entry.content: After checking with SAP Support, it appears it's either via the internet (unsafe) or via Edge Integration Cell. We are not using Edge Integration Cell so this adapter is not an option for us at this point in time.

entry.title: Payroll Third-Party Remittance(3PR) Evaluation Run in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

In the last month, we converted to S/4 HANA. We have a problem with Payroll Third party remittance processing.

In ECC, we were able to run 3PR evaluation run using PC00_M07_K500 when control record is in "EXIT" status and SAP recommends that it should be in EXIT status, whereas in S/4 it should be in "Release for payroll" status. We have a problem with this prerequisite in S/4. 

SAP recommends that Transfer to FI/CO, and Direct Deposit/Data Medium Exchange programs are run prior to beginning 3PR process. So, to run FI/CO posting, the control record should be in EXIT status, again to run 3PR after this, Evaluation program is expecting the control record to be in "Release for payroll" status, which is confusing.

We thought we can use "Ignore payroll control record" option on the payroll driver program, but this option works only in the Test systems based on the setting in table T000. It is not working in Production.

We are in second payroll run in S/4 now and this issue is impacting our 3PR processing in Production. In the last payroll run, we manually adjusted the control record to allow it to work. We need immediate feedback on this as we have an upcoming payroll run next Monday Nov 11th. Please suggest if we have any solution to this problem or advise if we are missing any step in S/4.

Thank you.

entry.title: Blended Calculation supported by Optimised design experience in the tables?
entry.content:
Hello @laura_vega

Does Blended Calculation supported by Optimised design experience in the tables? 

Could you please confirm on this or any roadmap planned. Your guidance will be of great support. 

Regards

Akshay

I'm looking forward to exploring SAP innovations, connecting with many other SAP connoisseurs, so that we can share the knowledge, and grow together. My Name is Kenneth and I'm looking forward to obtaining the skills to be an SAP Genius.

In the end I want to create a customer with this field filled.

SAP Business Accelerator Hub

entry.title: Streamlining Capacity Evaluation with the SAP Fiori App
entry.content:
Understanding SAP Evaluate Capacity Fiori App

Are you having trouble making your production strategy more efficient? SAP Evaluate Capacity has the potential to revolutionize your life! With the help of this robust SAP Fiori app, you can optimize your manufacturing procedures and guarantee that you have enough capacity to satisfy demand. With this app, you can see the capacity situation of work centers in a plant more clearly. You may visualize utilization at the group level by grouping work centers according to work center groups. Analytical and visual skills make understanding and controlling the effects of the capacity situation easier. It facilitates the production planner's planning, boosts productivity, and improves operations.

 

Key Features and Functionalities of SAP Evaluate Capacity Core Capabilities:

  • Analysis of Capacity Utilization: Accurately determine your manufacturing resources' capacity use.
    Determine any unused resources and any bottlenecks.
  • Analysis of the Root Cause: Investigate in-depth data to identify the underlying reasons for capacity problems.
    Determine the fundamental causes influencing manufacturing efficiency.
  • User-Friendly Interface: Adaptable Data Visualization
  • Examine data in table and graphic formats.
    To obtain a variety of viewpoints, switch between them.
  • Exploration of Interactive Data: To concentrate on particular regions of interest, slice, dice, and filter data.
  • Learn more about the trends in capacity use. Smart Aggregation in Advanced Analytics:
  • The app automatically calculates utilization according to the view level that is set.
    Work Center views use sum aggregation, and Work Center Group views use average aggregation.
  • Customized Perspectives: Filter work centers based on your specific responsibilities (Work Center Group or Work Center Person Responsible).
    Tailor the analysis to your needs.
  • Clear Data Presentation: The app displays relevant Work Center information in the operations table.
    The default dimensions are optimized for different responsibility levels.

Manage Work Center Groups - F4044

Before delving into the explanation of the evaluate capacity app, it is essential to first understand the concept of managing work center groups. By examining work center group management within the evaluate capacity app, we can gain deeper insights into the app's functionalities. For more information about the app, please refer to the following links.

F4044 - Manage Work Center Groups 

Manage Work Center Groups -Help

How to Create and Manage Work Center Groups

Leveraging Work Center Groups in SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Manufacturing

Work Center Group is a collection of related work centers. Think of it as a folder or category that helps you organize and manage your production resources. By grouping work centers together

 

 

 

 

You can create Work Center Groups and assign work centers or other work center groups to them, allowing for multiple levels of grouping.

 

 

Work Center Group Type

 

This is a standard work center group. If you need to add an additional group, you can do so through the configuration path: SIMG -> Production -> Basic Data -> Work Center -> Define Work Center Group Type.

 

Prerequisites

Before you start working on this app, make sure that the following criteria are met:

  • You’ll need the following role assigned to your user:

    • SAP_BR_PRODN_PLNR

  • Assign a Work Center Group to the user in the My Area of Responsibility - Work Center Groups app.

 

 

 

 

  • Set the Critical Load and Normal Load values in the Load Personalization section of the Configure Thresholds window accessed through the App Settings as shown in the image below:

 

 

 

Evaluate Capacity Fiori App - F6798

You can select a specific work center group in a specific period, as well as work center group types. There are various selection criteria that can be used to view the data.

You can choose the chart type to display the data and change it from the app.

 

You can view the utilization data by selecting different dimensions from the View By or View Settings menu.

 

 

View By Work Center Group / Time Period

View By Work Center Group / Time Period / Work Center

View By Work Center Group / Time Period / Work Center / Product

 View By Work Center Group / Time Period / Work Center / Product / Order Category

 

 

View By Work Center Group / Time Period / Work Center / Product / Order Category / Order Status

 
 
View By Work Center Group / Time Period / Work Center / Product / Order Category / Order Status / Customer
 

 Notes:

  • This app is available starting from the SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud & On-Premise 2023 release and is not available in earlier versions.
  •  This app is available starting from release 2402 and is not available in lower versions on S/4HANA Public Cloud.

References 

Evaluate Capacity

F6798 - Evaluate Capacity

entry.title: Re: New Resource-Related Intercompany Billing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content: Great information.  Do you have the roadmap when this would be released for Brazil, and for private client?

entry.title: Re: Dropping data lake relational container schema table
entry.content:
I finally had time to try and reproduce this.

Executing the following works to create the virtual and remote tables and then drop both the virtual and remote tables:

 

CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t1
( id INT PRIMARY KEY,
col2 VARCHAR(20)
) AT "SYSHDL_TIERING_CONTAINER_SOURCE"."NULL"."SYSHDL_TIERING_CONTAINER"."t1" WITH REMOTE;
 
DROP TABLE t1 WITH REMOTE;

Recreating the t1 table and then executing the DROP statement without the WITH REMOTE clause will drop just the virtual table in HANA without dropping the physical table in HDLRE: 

 
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t1
( id INT PRIMARY KEY,
col2 VARCHAR(20)
) AT "SYSHDL_TIERING_CONTAINER_SOURCE"."NULL"."SYSHDL_TIERING_CONTAINER"."t1" WITH REMOTE;
 
DROP TABLE t1;
 
To verify that the HDLRE table still exists, you can attempt to recreate the t1 table again. This will fail with an error indicating that table t1 still exists in HDLRE: 
 
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t1
( id INT PRIMARY KEY,
col2 VARCHAR(20)
) AT "SYSHDL_TIERING_CONTAINER_SOURCE"."NULL"."SYSHDL_TIERING_CONTAINER"."t1" WITH REMOTE;
 
Could not execute 'CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t1
( id INT PRIMARY KEY,
col2 VARCHAR(20)
) AT ...'
Error: (dberror) [403]: internal error: Failed to execute ddl on remote source table: [SAP][ODBC Driver][SAP HANA Cloud, data lake Relational Engine]Item 't1' already exists

entry.title: Re: Publish Data - SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: ok, this would be difficult at moment. It's recommended to just enter value on parent node for spreading if user has write access to all leaf nodes. There might be some enhancement planned to improve this in the future.

I have tried join with tables USR02, AGR_USERS, UJE_PROFILE_AGR, but I didn't get success yet.

Who can help me?
Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud Integration Basics
entry.content:
Great blog

Must read for All Commerce customers

Regards

entry.title: Availibility Check in STO Partially Shipped
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

I am transferring materials between 2 plants in the same company code. I am using an STO. I create an STO to transfer 10 pieces. When the STO gets created I do not have the material available. I manufacture 5 pieces. A job runs and creates  an outbound delivery for 5 pieces. The goods issue is posted. An inbound delivery gets created and received at the destination. Then I manufacture 5 more pieces. The job runs and no outbound delivery gets created. Even if I try manually creating the outbound delivery in VL10B, it does not work. I get an message informing that there are no schedule lines due. If I enter in the STO in change mode and run the availability check again manually the outbound delivery for the remaining 5 pieces gets created by the job. Is this the standard behavior? Is there any program that we can schedule to keep running availability check for outbound deliveries automatically? 

Thanks in advance,

Mauricio

entry.title: ODBC Connection Between SAP ECC and Excel
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

I am wondering if it is possible to connect Excel to the SAP ECC 6.0 Database using ODBC and how to do it.

I know it is possible in S/4 HANA. I remember once installing an ADD-ON to Excel, establishing a connection using a user and a password and being able to use some datasets in Excel. 

Any advice would be really appreciated. 

Thanks in advance,

Mauricio

entry.title: Re: SAP/hana-client library for node.js only works when user is logged in
entry.content: Oh, if you are using SAP HANA Cloud database, then it supports encrypted connections only, so `connOptions.encrypt = 'false';` should not allow a connection to be established.

entry.title: Internal Process Create and Confirm Adhoc Product WT using RFUI
entry.content:
Internal Process:
The activities and steps carried out within the warehouse to ensure smooth operations, including managing tasks and workflows.

Warehouse Task:
A specific activity assigned within the warehouse, such as picking, putaway, or inventory handling, to optimize movement and storage.

Adhoc Product WT:
An unscheduled warehouse task created to handle unplanned product movements, addressing immediate needs in the warehouse.

Warehouse Process Type:
Defines the type of activity or movement required for products within the warehouse, such as receiving, storage, or outbound processing, guiding task execution based on business requirements.

 

Steps to perform Internal Processes -> Create and Confirm Adhoc Product WT

Step1: Navigate to the RFUI screen using the transaction code /N/SCWM/RFUI

Provide the below details:

  1. Warehouse number
  2. Resource
  3. DefPresDvc

Then click on the enter Key

Select the option “Internal Processes”

 

 Then click on the option “Adhoc WT Creation”

 

 Then click on the option “Create and Confirm Adhoc Product WT”

 

Step2:

In the next screen provide the below details and click on enter.

  1. Source Bin
  2. Product
  3. Process Type

 

Then Provide the source quantity and Destination Bin and Click on enter key.

Step3:

In the next screen confirm the Product and Destination Bin

Step4:

The warehouse task is created and confirmed.

Conclusion:

Internal Process Create and Confirm Adhoc Product WT using RFUI explained.

entry.title: Internal Process Create and Confirm Adhoc HU WT using RFUI
entry.content:
Adhoc Product WT:
An unscheduled warehouse task created to handle unplanned product movements, addressing immediate needs in the warehouse.

Warehouse Process Type:
Defines the type of activity or movement required for products within the warehouse, such as receiving, storage, or outbound processing, guiding task execution based on business requirements.

Internal Process:
The activities and steps carried out within the warehouse to ensure smooth operations, including managing tasks and workflows.

Warehouse Task:
A specific activity assigned within the warehouse, such as picking, putaway, or inventory handling, to optimize movement and storage.

Steps to perform Internal Processes -> Create and Confirm Adhoc HU WT

Step1:

Navigate to the RFUI screen using the transaction code /N/SCWM/RFUI

Provide the below details:

  1. Warehouse number
  2. Resource
  3. DefPresDvc

Then click on the enter Key

 

Select the option “Internal Processes”

 Then click on the option “Adhoc WT Creation”

 

Then click on the option “Create and Confirm Adhoc HU WT”

Step2:

In the next screen provide the below details and click on enter.

  1. ID
  2. Process Type

Then Provide the Destination Bin and Destination HU and Click on enter key.

Step3:

The warehouse task is created and confirmed.

Conclusion:

Internal Process Create and Confirm Adhoc HU WT using RFUI explained.

entry.title: How to map Groups from Okta to NEO Subaccount's Roles?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using a corporate IDP on IAS.

We want the groups to flow from OKTA to the Neo SUbaccounts however there is no section to maintain the mapping against the Role collections.

Need help to understand how this can be achieved


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to map Groups from Okta to NEO Subaccount's Roles?
entry.content:
Hi,

In order to map the groups from Okta to a Role in the Subaccount from NEO environment, you need to refer to https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-btp-neo-environment/map-users-or-groups-to-roles-subscriptions?q=Role+mapping

Wishing you have a nice day ahead! 😊
Vini
SAP Support
BTP Integrations & Foundation Services | BTP Foundation Technologies

entry.title: Re: How to query Users ad their own Authorization Groups
entry.content: Could you provide more specific details?

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion Usage and Context Help Visits reports a...
entry.content:
Hi,

If no tracking data is available for content accessed from SAP Companion, at all, it's pretty likely that tracking has not been turned on in the SAP Companion configuration.  To turn on tracking of content accessed from SAP Companion, you must have the following parameter details added to the SAP Companion configuration:

trackingUrlSEN=https://customername.enable-now.cloud.sap/wa/WorkareaID/

Where:

customername - is the name of your Enable Now system
WorkareaID - is the ID of the Workarea that SAP Companion used to access content

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Monitor Purchase Order Items app show incorrectly data for delivery date
entry.content: Hi Sherget, did you find any solution?

i would like to be part of digital skills initiative, i want to enhance my knowledge and start a new career, i left my company and i am looking for new opportunities.

entry.title: Re: QM PP QA32
entry.content:
Hello! This problem can have a few origins or even not be a problem.
Considering the little information mentioned in the post, you can verify that:

- It is a quantitative characteristic and the option "Enter results" is not enabled in the characteristic control code;

Also check if it is a control characteristic that has a dynamic control rule, so it has been skipped.

entry.title: Re: How to tackle Quality Issues after UD?
entry.content:
This is a good way to deal with the problem. The material situation is analyzed from the manual inspection lot (origin 89) and dealt with in greater depth with the quality notification.

Another possibility is to activate control type 08 for the material and move the goods to a warehouse (it can be the same one). This will keep the material in quality control.
From there, simply proceed with the analysis and decision on use, record defects and, if necessary, process the material with quality notification.

If you are going to analyze the material with a task list, remember to enable the options (in the control type control parameterization) indicated in the attached image:

Thank you and I hope I helped.

entry.title: Re: SAP Demo Systems - IDES (ECC) VS BBP (S/4HANA)
entry.content: Currently, I have been using the SAP IDES from sapidessandbox.com for about a year. So far, it’s running smoothly. I can only recommend it—it’s very stable.

entry.title: Issue with Derivation in a new lines BEx-Query (When Do not display)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an issue with derivation in a new lines BEx-query.

 

Field ZBCURK (Book Currency) is derived from 0COMP_CODE (0COMP_CODE -> ZBCURK)

As you know, ZBCURK is currency field. So, cannot removed from aggregation.

And Because of the user's requirements, the field must be hidden.

 

When the target I/O (ZBCURK) is "Display" (but not filled),

There is no Issue. Data is saved with All attributes being fulfilled.

 

However, When the target I/O (ZBCURK) is "Do not Display" (not filled, Of course)

The Error occurred : 

Missing attribute value in new column / row (ZBCURK)

Unable to check new value for backend, check input.

(The derivation is not working)

 

Relevant Settings are below.

RSADMIN - BICS_NEW_LINE_CHECK_ENABLED : X (Checked)

Analysis Office Technical Setting - New Line Check Mode : NONE (Same as MEMBERS, LINES)

 

Anything I missed?

entry.title: Re: Mass UD without result recording
entry.content:
Hello Subramani!

Using the t-code QM16, it is possible to make the mass usage decision, but there is a validation for this:
- The inspection lot cannot have mandatory characteristics that are open;
- The inspection lot cannot have any characteristics that have been rejected.

 

I must admit that I found it a bit strange that several inspection lots were generated for the same batch of material. I imagine that they come from several movements of goods generated over time.
If the ideal situation for this situation is to have only one inspection lot for the same batch, regardless of the number of movements or entries of goods, I recommend that you analyze the option to create the lot for the type of inspection used:

Thank you and I hope I have helped you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Demo Systems - IDES (ECC) VS BBP (S/4HANA)
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Thanks for sharing, it help us a lot.

 

Regards,

🙂

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Download File on Action in CAP / Java Application
entry.content:
Hi @dvalasek ,

I haven't tried, but I would give it a shot in the following way if you already have your method implemented:

  • check if model follows Serving Media Data
  • add on On event handler for the READ method on your entity in the same way as described in Custom Streaming (Node beta), check if the media type element in question is requested, if yes, return the stream with the method you just created, otherwse continue processing
  • build and test with the following URL pattern: /YourEntity(<ID>)/MediaTypeElement as described in Reading Media Resources

In the documentation the custom streaming topic is only for Node and it is in beta currently. I tested the Node.js version with a basic scenario and it worked for me with @sap/cds: 8.4.0

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Unable to Delete BIN
entry.content:
We found an issue with transaction /SCWM/LS02

The transaction is not giving the correct error message when the bin is assigned to a Work Center. 

The transaction should send the message  /SCWM/lc1 message 177:

     Storage bin xxxx assigned to work center yyyy - Deletion not allowed.

However, it is simply sending back the generic message: Error deleting storage bin.

entry.title: Elimination postings in group reporting
entry.content:
Hi All,

In Group reporting data analysis with posting rules, COI elimination entries are not showing under the first common parent virtual elimination entity while posting level 20 (AR/AP elims etc.) are showing correctly.

The business requirement is to show all the elimination entries (Posting levels 20 & 30 )  in a separate column for analysis. Currently, only posting level data is showing under the consolidation group virtual elim entity column while PL 30 data is shown under the parent/sub cons units.

any ideas are appreciated.

 

Thanks,

SV

entry.title: Re: Multiple items of one material in a delivery an QM In...
entry.content:
Hello! I may have misunderstood, but in this case if you keep the option "For each material document item" and disable the option "Post to Insp. Stock" you will have multiple inspection lots and the material will not be posted to Q stock.

Thank you and I hope I understood and helped you.

entry.title: Re: Efficient Management of CBC Type Transport Requests in S/4HANA Cloud Public Cloud
entry.content:
Thanks for this

Is there any documentation on what gets locked when performing a CBC activity? We created a new company code in CBC and it went into Production soon after and also locked a lot of transactions in the system. I thought it will be only reflected in  Dev system.
You mention that it gets automatically released. Is there a way of stopping that or controlling the release.

Also does the same apply if activating a new Scope ID?

entry.title: Round off Values in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I am wondering if I want to specify to which decimal place I would like to round for a certain value in SAP Cloud Integration, is there any standard function I can use?

Right now I am aware that I can use "Message Mapping" - "Round Function".

However, with this function, I can not round the results to one decimal place by rounding the second decimal place. 

If I want to, for example, round "18.2252" to "18.23", is there any standard function in message mapping I can use? (Maybe FormatNumber?But I do not know how to use it)

Or the only way would be UDF?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Process Control
entry.content:
Hi @Jack-pyo 

Thank you for providing the screenshot. However, I am currently using S/4HANA Cloud, and it seems different from your system.😵

Additionally, I’d like to confirm: does FOC order stand for Free of Charge? How can I create an FOC purchase order?

entry.title: Date conversion directly in CDS View entity
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to change the value of a Date field directly in my CDS View; I want to convert this value to the last day of the previous month. It seems very simple as a need but in CDS View I have trouble 🙂

I tried to use the functions dats_add_months, dats_add_days, combined with cast and substring but I always run into compilation problems, in short I can't do it, in pure ABAP it would take a few seconds 🙂

I was suggested to possibly go through an AMDP function, what do you think?

For example if I have the value 20241015, the converted value will be 20240930, if I have the value 20240123 the converted value will be 20231231.

Thank you very much for your help.

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Process Control
entry.content: Oh, I see... you could try to find PO item cagtegory configuration whether can or can not change it. Regarding FOC, yes it is free of charge order and you can set it up in the "Create Purchase Order" Fiori app. See my previous screenshot number 3 since create purchase order frontend public clould is similar to OP.

entry.title: Intelligent Services - HR Triggers (IAM Integration)
entry.content:
We are in the process of enabling HR triggers for Hire, Rehire, Termination, Job updates from SuccessFactors to SAP IAG system where the accesses are managed and provisioned centrally. As part of this connectivity  where employees are created from SF to IAG, we need to perform some checks within employee data before we get these events triggered. 

The reasoning behind this is, the username and email ID are updated from AD (Active Directory) Integration into SF after employees is hired, so the HR Triggers should initiate after ensuring the updates from AD into employee profile (username & email). Is there a provision to include this check as part of intelligent services to ensure the HR trigger is initiated only after the email ID & the username are updated in employee profile. Appreciate your input.

entry.title: ps
entry.content:
想請問Publice cloud是否可以直接銷售出貨專案庫存(601+Q)

 

情境為採購入庫時，存貨入到專案庫存(Q)，直接銷售此專案庫存(Q)

 

步驟:

  1. 採購單(有維護專案號碼)入庫時，存貨入到專案庫存(Q)
  2. 開立銷售訂單SO&出貨單DN，銷售訂單上有維護專案號碼(WBS)，開立出貨單，出貨單也有專案號碼(WBS)，但是發貨過帳時，系統只允許出未限制庫存(601)
  3. IMG的ITEM CATEGORY在PUBLIC CLOUD無法調整，所以也無法調整Special stock-Q

4.查看Scope:6GD - Engineer Products and Systems - Project with Production

但此scope 銷售訂單出貨是出貨未限制庫存(601)，非銷售專案庫存。

 

出貨單，如下，有維護專案號碼(WBS)，但是代碼為601，而不是601+Q

目前此料有庫存於專案庫存(Q)

ITEM CATEGORY

entry.title: SAP HIgh memory usage
entry.content:
Hi PERSON_NAME,
We have been observing high memory usage on SAP PERSON_NAME production system since yesterday.
Pool/PersistenceManager/PersistentSpace/DefaultLPA/LOBPage is around 66 GB now and it is increasing every hour.
 
Our current PERSON_NAME version is '2.00.059.PHONE_NUMBER'
Attaching output of "HANA_Memory_TopConsumers_TimeSlices_2.00.043+", "HANA_LOBs_DiskLOBs_2.00.040+.txt".
 

Please let us know how to stop the growing memory and bring down high memory usage on PERSON_NAME.
 Let us know what is causing the growth of LOB pages?

Thanks,
Chaitanya

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Installation

Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: PERSON_NAME Software

Q: SAP PERSON_NAME Revision number and Operating System where software is being installed
A:

Q: Software being upgraded (source and target)?
A...(truncated)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP HIgh memory usage
entry.content:
3312385 - High memory usage on Disk LOB Caching
2220627 - FAQ: SAP HANA LOBs

entry.title: Publice cloud是否可以直接銷售出貨專案庫存(601+Q)
entry.content:
情境為採購入庫時，存貨入到專案庫存(Q)，直接銷售此專案庫存(Q)

 

步驟:

  1. 採購單(有維護專案號碼)入庫時，存貨入到專案庫存(Q)
  2. 開立銷售訂單SO&出貨單DN，銷售訂單上有維護專案號碼(WBS)，開立出貨單，出貨單也有專案號碼(WBS)，但是發貨過帳時，系統只允許出未限制庫存(601)
  3. IMG的ITEM CATEGORY在PUBLIC CLOUD無法調整，所以也無法調整Special stock-Q

4.查看Scope:6GD - Engineer Products and Systems - Project with Production

但此scope 銷售訂單出貨是出貨未限制庫存(601)，非銷售專案庫存。

 

出貨單，如下，有維護專案號碼(WBS)，但是代碼為601，而不是601+Q

目前此料有庫存於專案庫存(Q)

ITEM CATEGORY

entry.title: Re: Single Delivery from Multiple Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi,

To create a single delivery from multiple sales orders, follow these steps:

1. Open the APP "Create Outbound Deliveries - From Sales Orders" (F0869A).
2. You'll see a list of sales documents, including sales orders waiting for delivery.
3. Select the multiple sales orders you wish to combine into one delivery.
4. Click "Create Delivery."

The system will automatically create a collective delivery for the selected sales orders if they meet the necessary prerequisites:

  • Order items or schedule lines that have identical shipping criteria are combined in one delivery. If the data varies between items, for example, if a different ship-to party is defined for each item, two deliveries must be created for the order. Order items from different orders can be grouped together in one delivery provided that they have the same shipping criteria and sold-to party.

For more details, please refer to Creating Outbound Deliveries.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: How to update Master Recipes thru abap Program(Not thru C202)
entry.content:
Hi there, 

May I know have you managed to update the master recipes, for standard value 1 to standard value 6 in PLPO table?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Missing "AdditionalMaterialGroup1" Property in Sales...
entry.content:
Hi,

You may try the following workaround: join the data output with the Sales Organization Data node from the API Product Master (A2X) to derive the material groups 1 to 5.

In the meantime, we encourage you to provide feedback on this functionality request for the Sales Order A2X v4.0 API at S/4HANA Cloud, public edition APIs | SAP Customer Influence Portal .

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: sales price not determining in classic variant config...
entry.content:
Hi,

If your customer has subscribed to the S/4HANA Cloud, public edition,(with Grow with SAP packages) and has NOT subscribed to the additional licenses for any advanced variant configuration (AVC) related scope items, they will not be able to utilize the corresponding functionality in the Public Cloud solution.

In S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, only AVC is supported, and the classic variant configuration functions (LO-VC) are not supported.

Best Regards,
Fancy
